title: Aquatic Beds
body:
# Aquatic Beds

**Aquatic Beds** is a tiny Minecraft resource pack that adds aquatic styled beds to the game.

---

## Why use **Aquatic Beds**?
- Ideal for ocean worlds
- Vanilla-friendly
- Fresh design

---

## ❓ FAQ

### Is this client-side?
Yes. You can use it in singleplayer or on any server.

### Does it work with other resource packs?
Yes. Place **Aquatic Beds** above other packs if they also modify beds.

---

## 📌 Compatibility
- Minecraft **1.20+**
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
- Compatible with mods and resource packs
